name: Payment flow — initiate and enter M-Pesa number

payload.text:
Premium group access costs 500 KES.

Enter your M-Pesa phone number to receive a payment prompt:

You'll pay 500 KES to M-Pesa Till 123456.

A payment prompt will be sent to 254712345678.

name: Payment flow — invalid phone number rejected

payload.text:
Premium group access costs 500 KES.

Enter your M-Pesa phone number to receive a payment prompt:
Invalid phone number. Enter a valid M-Pesa number (e.g. 0712345678):

name: Payment flow — confirm payment triggers STK push

payload.text:
Premium group access costs 500 KES.

Enter your M-Pesa phone number to receive a payment prompt:

You'll pay 500 KES to M-Pesa Till 123456.

A payment prompt will be sent to 254712345678.

Payment could not be initiated: M-Pesa integration not configured. Please pay manually.

You can retry or check your payment status later.
